_comment: NowPayments crypto currency routing rules. Background: NowPayments requires a cross-currency swap when the client pays in a different currency than the payout wallet. Swaps have dynamic minimums (~20-25 EUR) based on network fees and liquidity. Below the threshold we force USDT TRC20 (same as payout wallet) to avoid the swap entirely — only a ~1 EUR TRON network fee applies. Above the threshold the swap minimum is comfortably covered and the client can choose any currency. In the grey zone we query /v1/min-amount per currency and filter.

below_threshold.description: Force USDT TRC20 (= payout wallet currency) to skip the cross-swap. Works for any amount.

above_threshold.description: Let client choose freely. Cross-swap covers its own minimum at these amounts.
